crypto_wallet_id.description: The unique ID for a crypto wallet

crypto_wallet_address.description: The actual blockchain address of the User's crypto wallet.

crypto_wallet_type.description: The blockchain that the User's crypto wallet operates on, e.g. Ethereum, Solana, etc.

verified.description: The verified boolean denotes whether or not this send method, e.g. phone number, email address, etc., has been successfully authenticated by the User.
